Assign the Authentication Extensibility Password Administrator role to users who need to trigger password submit custom authentication events to migrate user passwords from an external system to Microsoft Entra External ID.

<!-- autogenerated content starts here -->

> [!div class="mx-tableFixed"]
> | Actions | Description |
> | --- | --- |
> | microsoft.directory/onPasswordSubmitCustomAuthenticationExtension/allProperties/allTasks | Create and manage custom authentication extensions for onPasswordSubmit events<br/>[![Privileged label icon.](../media/permissions-reference/privileged-label.png)](../privileged-roles-permissions.md) |
